name: Mary Mancini
subject: TOMORROW EVENING! Join us in Cookeville
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lE12hCsAELesqEdmvYvn9TtRVmI314G4cEFHYo6A4gE=/MVLn7NDEpQulJ-CLvm_PCqGaYZvjRvFpwZyraiVgo70=)
Dear Peter,
Tomorrow evening (Monday, Dec. 10), we're heading to Putnam County for the last stop on our statewide **_ANALYZE, ORGANIZE, MOBILIZE_** Tour! Join us from **6pm-8pm CT in Cookeville** for a public forum -- an opportunity for you, as a member of the Tennessee Democratic Party, to discuss the 2018 election cycle and our path forward in 2019, 2020, and beyond.

**It 's free to attend, but please [click here to RSVP](https://act.myngp.com/el/lE12hCsAELesqEdmvYvn9TtRVmI314G4cEFHYo6A4gE=/PQj4h3jJxL0DzB-8hvSYDNXqEC4eaM57UAmYtr-tq6Y=) to let us know you're coming. **

Opportunities to [**sponsor the tour**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lE12hCsAELesqEdmvYvn9TtRVmI314G4cEFHYo6A4gE=/hxNiOBB92v2JLuunBVxHoa1cBVFC5IerT-_xW-dGklQ=) are also available to help defray costs. Sponsorship levels are detailed below.

And **[share the event on Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/lE12hCsAELesqEdmvYvn9TtRVmI314G4cEFHYo6A4gE=/uG2V8hjlkPmcsV9MyZQg0-R5j0kGX7kxv_xzO4LmdKs=)** to spread the word and invite friends, family, and neighbors.

Thank you so much for your support. We look forward to seeing you!

Mary and the TNDP Team
\--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

* * *

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/lE12hCsAELesqEdmvYvn9TtRVmI314G4cEFHYo6A4gE=/PQj4h3jJxL0DzB-8hvSYDNXqEC4eaM57UAmYtr-tq6Y=)
**TNDP Analyze **• **Organize **• **Mobilize Tour**
Monday, Dec. 10, 2018 | 6pm-8pm CT
Putnam County Democratic Party Headquarters
[111 N. Cedar Ave, Cookeville, TN 38501](https://act.myngp.com/el/lE12hCsAELesqEdmvYvn9TtRVmI314G4cEFHYo6A4gE=/FIQHW3UeFA9YQ0CVMkFFwGaanL7z7BGYU2g7S3ENzCQ=)

Join the TNDP and our sponsors:

**CO-SPONSORS ($500)**
Andrew Byrd

**HOSTS ($250)**

**Sponsorships available:**
Co-Host: $100
Host: $250

Sponsor: $1,000
Primary Sponsor: $2,500
Click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lE12hCsAELesqEdmvYvn9TtRVmI314G4cEFHYo6A4gE=/PQj4h3jJxL0DzB-8hvSYDNXqEC4eaM57UAmYtr-tq6Y=) to RSVP. Purchase sponsorships [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lE12hCsAELesqEdmvYvn9TtRVmI314G4cEFHYo6A4gE=/hxNiOBB92v2JLuunBVxHoa1cBVFC5IerT-_xW-dGklQ=) or contact Sandra Sepulveda at [sandra@tndp.org](https://act.myngp.com/el/lE12hCsAELesqEdmvYvn9TtRVmI314G4cEFHYo6A4gE=/kAQdq4sDknUh91Um1JdF4cdIfUz82fi8apUodyIpjYM=) or 615-327-9779.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Council for a Livable World
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter, we won a tough campaign -- together. You were a big part of that victory and I hope you know how much I appreciate it. Many people and organizations helped us along the way. Today, I want to introduce you to one of those organizations I think you might be interested in: the **Council for a Livable World (CLW).** After the Cuban Missile Crisis, Dr. Leo Szilard founded the Council for a Livable World to give impartial advice to policymakers and to support candidates who believe in reducing the threat of the world's most dangerous weapons. Led by former Congressman John Tierney, CLW provided support from its national network to get our message out to voters. And we weren't the only ones -- overall, CLW helped 49 other campaigns across the country and raised $1.2 million for candidates. **It 's a great organization that does a lot of important work. [I encourage you to sign up for updates from CLW. Click here to join, learn more, and see how you can help them grow.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdbc/4462dc26/89e787c7/201efaae/1753410291/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181209")** With gratitude, Sherrod
---

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdbc/4462dc26/89e787c7/201efaad/1753410291/VEsE/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdbc/4462dc26/89e787c7/201efaac/1753410291/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/unsubscribe")

Led by former Congressman John Tierney, CLW provided support from its national network to get our message out to voters. And we weren't the only ones -- overall, CLW helped 49 other campaigns across the country and raised $1.2 million for candidates. It 's a great organization that does a lot of important work. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: another kind of "Freshmen Orientation"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
This month, our team has been busy preparing to hit the ground running in January so that we can best serve 7th district families in Congress. To get started, other newly-elected members and I spent three weeks in new member orientation -- what many call "freshmen orientation!"
| | Peter, I hope you and your families are enjoying the start to the holiday season! This month, our team has been busy preparing to hit the ground running in January so that we can best serve 7th district families in Congress. To get started, **other newly-elected members and I spent three weeks in new member orientation -- what many call "freshmen orientation!"** If you think it sounds a little like college, don't worry, we've all made that joke as well, especially when new Congress members are walking around the Capitol campus in large groups looking for their classroom! We've had substantive briefings on topics such as tax and health care policy, Congressional reforms, national security concerns, building effective offices in D.C. and our districts, House ethics, and workplace diversity. We were fortunate to hear speakers like Bryan Stevenson, author of _Just Mercy,_ and Malala, the Nobel Peace Prize-winning activist. Of everything we've experienced these past three weeks, the most entertaining was the process of choosing an office! The process is done by a lottery, and the political newspaper _Roll Call_ followed my team around as we entered the lottery, looked at offices, and picked VA-07's new home on Capitol Hill. _Roll Call 's _behind-the-scenes video is pretty fun. [**You can watch it here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6Mdv1665OnbepSkvtcLNqi1eEB4nqn7MRi_ym9AnbWQ=/XjX09l2I7m7X6hp22ALzeHD5YT75P0ob_hfBiv7ZTl4=?bt_ee=cxiK4%2Blnl3z4EUWFvMp4tn%2F9OYjigJ72ItG4QvB7xPnJWcS809p73JGPU4cmXUPl&bt_ts=1543862989497&fbclid=IwAR1igv4weL2AD1PzLLOwSzbv7s7xpKCTenFKO-SwaUU8QwbhGQaeUv_yrPs) I look forward to welcoming constituents to our office once we're settled in January. Thank you, as always, for all of your support, Peter. I'll continue to keep you updated on my work on behalf of the 7th district. Thanks, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6Mdv1665OnbepSkvtcLNqi1eEB4nqn7MRi_ym9AnbWQ=/1-Es6Ang03cDP0nKxzBJ88wMdlUHBpNQmlPdavyuGMk=?refcode=em_fr_2018.12.07_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6Mdv1665OnbepSkvtcLNqi1eEB4nqn7MRi_ym9AnbWQ=/1-Es6Ang03cDP0nKxzBJ88wMdlUHBpNQmlPdavyuGMk=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative-elect for Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/6Mdv1665OnbepSkvtcLNqi1eEB4nqn7MRi_ym9AnbWQ=/EPXmc3C6NnAHCpjzExSIhGk8cwSDq-UReVTcF1EQmSY=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---

PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

If you think it sounds a little like college, don't worry, we've all made that joke as well, especially when new Congress members are walking around the Capitol campus in large groups looking for their classroom! We've had substantive briefings on topics such as tax and health care policy, Congressional reforms, national security concerns, building effective offices in D.C. and our districts, House ethics, and workplace diversity.
